sections.paragraph:
- Original: κατεργάζομαι

- Transliteration: Katergazomai

- Phonetic: kat-er-gad'-zom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to perform, accomplish, achieve

2. to work out i.e. to do that from which something results

a. of things: bring about, result in

3. to fashion i.e. render one fit for a thing

- Origin: from G2596 and G2038

- TDNT entry: 13:34,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2596 and G2038; to work fully that is accomplish; by implication to finish fashion: - cause do (deed) perform work (out).
